mapper.select: select ci.v_career_id , ci.v_career_nm , to_char(ci.d_start_dtm, 'YYYY-MM') as d_start_dtm , to_char(ci.d_end_dtm, 'YYYY-MM') as d_end_dtm , (EXTRACT(year FROM AGE(d_end_dtm, d_start_dtm)) * 12 + EXTRACT(month FROM AGE(d_end_dtm, d_start_dtm))) AS total_months from career_info ci order by ci.d_start_dtm
